prompt:
You are a task dispatcher for soul-os. Given an agent roster and a list of unassigned tasks, assign each task to the most suitable agent based on the agent's description and task types.

Agent roster:
[
  {"name": "system_agent", "description": "Monitors system health, runs diagnostics, and performs remediation actions.", "task_types": ["health_check", "disk_cleanup", "service_restart"]},
  {"name": "knowledge_agent", "description": "Manages the knowledge base: ingests, deduplicates, and consolidates documents.", "task_types": ["kb_ingest", "kb_consolidate", "kb_search"]},
  {"name": "outreach_copywriter", "description": "Drafts and refines outbound email campaigns for leads and prospects.", "task_types": ["draft_email", "review_email", "personalize_email"]}
]

Unassigned tasks:
[
  {"task_id": 1, "description": "Run a system health check and report disk usage"},
  {"task_id": 2, "description": "Consolidate duplicate entries in the knowledge base"},
  {"task_id": 3, "description": "Draft cold outreach emails for 10 new leads"}
]

Respond with only a JSON array where each element has exactly two keys: 'task_id' (integer) and 'agent' (string matching an agent name from the roster). Assign every task. No explanation.

You are a task dispatcher for soul-os. Given an agent roster and a list of unassigned tasks, assign each task to the most suitable agent. Not all agents need to be assigned a task.

Agent roster:
[
  {"name": "system_agent", "description": "Monitors system health, runs diagnostics, and performs remediation actions.", "task_types": ["health_check", "disk_cleanup", "service_restart"]},
  {"name": "knowledge_agent", "description": "Manages the knowledge base: ingests, deduplicates, and consolidates documents.", "task_types": ["kb_ingest", "kb_consolidate", "kb_search"]},
  {"name": "outreach_copywriter", "description": "Drafts and refines outbound email campaigns for leads and prospects.", "task_types": ["draft_email", "review_email", "personalize_email"]},
  {"name": "scheduler_agent", "description": "Manages cron jobs, task queues, and scheduled pipeline runs.", "task_types": ["schedule_job", "cancel_job", "list_jobs"]}
]

Unassigned tasks:
[
  {"task_id": 10, "description": "Restart the soul-os service that failed overnight"},
  {"task_id": 11, "description": "Ingest 50 new research documents into the knowledge base"}
]

Respond with only a JSON array where each element has exactly two keys: 'task_id' (integer) and 'agent' (string matching an agent name from the roster). Assign every task. Agents with no tasks are simply omitted from the array. No explanation.

You are a task dispatcher for soul-os. Given an agent roster and a list of unassigned tasks, assign each task to the most suitable agent. Multiple tasks may be assigned to the same agent.

Agent roster:
[
  {"name": "system_agent", "description": "Monitors system health, runs diagnostics, and performs remediation actions.", "task_types": ["health_check", "disk_cleanup", "service_restart"]},
  {"name": "outreach_copywriter", "description": "Drafts and refines outbound email campaigns for leads and prospects.", "task_types": ["draft_email", "review_email", "personalize_email"]}
]

Unassigned tasks:
[
  {"task_id": 20, "description": "Draft a cold email for lead Alice Chen at TechCorp"},
  {"task_id": 21, "description": "Prune unused Docker images to free up disk space"},
  {"task_id": 22, "description": "Personalize the follow-up email template for lead Bob Patel"},
  {"task_id": 23, "description": "Check CPU temperature and restart throttled services"}
]

Respond with only a JSON array where each element has exactly two keys: 'task_id' (integer) and 'agent' (string matching an agent name from the roster). Assign every task. No explanation.
